tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All laboratory values are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated LDL cholesterol (106.7 mg/dL; upper limit 100 mg/dL). Glycemic control, renal function, electrolytes, and lipid profile (except LDL) are unremarkable. No evidence of microalbuminuria. Recommend monitoring and considering LDL-lowering interventions if clinically indicated, especially given age-related cardiovascular risk.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus

tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
